limitations: Shopify sales join uses local LK OS spine whose latest order in this SQLite is 2026-04-16; recent Shopify sales report was not full line-item by handle.
Tiny full stock snapshot is partial/rate-limited; availability is directional and must be rechecked before product-specific writes.
Collection joins use token matching across active product handles/title/tags; exact collection membership should be added in next iteration.
Margin/cost is not reliably populated for most variants; score uses revenue/stock/demand and marks margin as gap.
Public HTML score is included only after commercial demand qualifies the page.
